**UTC−06:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of −06:00.
In North America, it is observed in the [Central Time Zone](/wiki/Central_Time_Zone "Central Time Zone") during [standard time](/wiki/Standard_time "Standard time"), and in the [Mountain Time Zone](/wiki/Mountain_Time_Zone "Mountain Time Zone") during the other eight months (see [daylight saving time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time "Daylight saving time")). Several Latin American countries and a few other places use it year-round.

## As standard time (Northern Hemisphere winter)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (Northern Hemisphere winter)")]

Principal cities: [Winnipeg](/wiki/Winnipeg "Winnipeg"), [Chicago](/wiki/Chicago "Chicago"), [Dallas](/wiki/Dallas "Dallas"), [Houston](/wiki/Houston "Houston"), [St. Louis](/wiki/St._Louis "St. Louis"), [Minneapolis](/wiki/Minneapolis "Minneapolis"), [Austin](/wiki/Austin,_Texas "Austin, Texas"), [Memphis](/wiki/Memphis,_Tennessee "Memphis, Tennessee"), [Kansas City](/wiki/Kansas_City "Kansas City"), [San Antonio](/wiki/San_Antonio "San Antonio"), [Nashville](/wiki/Nashville "Nashville"), [New Orleans](/wiki/New_Orleans "New Orleans"), [Milwaukee](/wiki/Milwaukee "Milwaukee"), [Oklahoma City](/wiki/Oklahoma_City "Oklahoma City"), [Reynosa](/wiki/Reynosa "Reynosa")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: North America")]

CST is standard time in the 6th time zone west of Greenwich, centralized by the 90th meridian; used in North America in some parts of Canada, Mexico and the United States.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

* Canada ([Central Time Zone](/wiki/Central_Time_Zone "Central Time Zone"))
  + [Manitoba](/wiki/Manitoba "Manitoba")
  + [Nunavut](/wiki/Nunavut "Nunavut")
    - [Kivalliq Region](/wiki/Kivalliq_Region "Kivalliq Region") except [Southampton Island](/wiki/Southampton_Island "Southampton Island") ([Coral Harbour](/wiki/Coral_Harbour,_Nunavut "Coral Harbour, Nunavut"))
  + [Ontario](/wiki/Ontario "Ontario")
    - West of 90° west[[2]](#cite_note-ttont-2)
* Mexico (near US border with Texas)
  + [Chihuahua](/wiki/Chihuahua_(state) "Chihuahua (state)")
    - The municipalities of [Coyame del Sotol](/wiki/Coyame_del_Sotol "Coyame del Sotol"), [Ojinaga](/wiki/Ojinaga_Municipality "Ojinaga Municipality") and [Manuel Benavides](/wiki/Manuel_Benavides_Municipality "Manuel Benavides Municipality")[[3]](#cite_note-cenam-3)
  + [Coahuila de Zaragoza](/wiki/Coahuila_de_Zaragoza "Coahuila de Zaragoza")
    - The municipalities of [Acuña](/wiki/Acu%C3%B1a_Municipality "Acuña Municipality"), [Allende](/wiki/Allende_Municipality,_Coahuila "Allende Municipality, Coahuila"), [Guerrero](/wiki/Guerrero_Municipality,_Coahuila "Guerrero Municipality, Coahuila"), [Hidalgo](/wiki/Hidalgo_Municipality,_Coahuila "Hidalgo Municipality, Coahuila"), [Jiménez](/wiki/Jim%C3%A9nez_Municipality,_Coahuila "Jiménez Municipality, Coahuila"), [Morelos](/wiki/Morelos_Municipality,_Coahuila "Morelos Municipality, Coahuila"), [Nava](/wiki/Nava_Municipality "Nava Municipality"), [Ocampo](/wiki/Ocampo_Municipality,_Coahuila "Ocampo Municipality, Coahuila"), [Piedras Negras](/wiki/Piedras_Negras_Municipality "Piedras Negras Municipality"), [Villa Unión](/wiki/Villa_Uni%C3%B3n_Municipality "Villa Unión Municipality") and [Zaragoza](/wiki/Zaragoza_Municipality,_Coahuila "Zaragoza Municipality, Coahuila")
  + [Nuevo León](/wiki/Nuevo_Le%C3%B3n "Nuevo León")
    - The municipality of [Anahuac](/wiki/An%C3%A1huac_Municipality "Anáhuac Municipality")
  + [Tamaulipas](/wiki/Tamaulipas "Tamaulipas")
    - The municipalities of [Nuevo Laredo](/wiki/Nuevo_Laredo_Municipality "Nuevo Laredo Municipality"), [Guerrero](/wiki/Guerrero_Municipality,_Tamaulipas "Guerrero Municipality, Tamaulipas"), [Mier](/wiki/Mier_Municipality "Mier Municipality"), [Miguel Alemán](/wiki/Miguel_Alem%C3%A1n_Municipality "Miguel Alemán Municipality"), [Camargo](/wiki/Camargo_Municipality,_Tamaulipas "Camargo Municipality, Tamaulipas"), [Gustavo Díaz Ordaz](/wiki/Gustavo_D%C3%ADaz_Ordaz,_Tamaulipas "Gustavo Díaz Ordaz, Tamaulipas"), [Reynosa](/wiki/Reynosa_Municipality "Reynosa Municipality"), [Río Bravo](/wiki/R%C3%ADo_Bravo_Municipality "Río Bravo Municipality"), [Valle Hermoso](/wiki/Valle_Hermoso_Municipality "Valle Hermoso Municipality") and [Matamoros](/wiki/Matamoros_Municipality,_Tamaulipas "Matamoros Municipality, Tamaulipas")
* United States (Central Time Zone)
  + [Alabama](/wiki/Alabama "Alabama")
    - The city of [Phenix City](/wiki/Phenix_City,_Alabama "Phenix City, Alabama") uses both UTC−05:00 and UTC−06:00 due to its proximity to [Columbus](/wiki/Columbus,_Georgia "Columbus, Georgia"), [Georgia](/wiki/Georgia_(U.S._state) "Georgia (U.S. state)")
  + [Arkansas](/wiki/Arkansas "Arkansas")
  + [Florida](/wiki/Florida "Florida")
    - The counties of Bay, Calhoun, Escambia, Holmes, Jackson, Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Walton, and Washington, and northern Gulf County (panhandle)[[4]](#cite_note-statoidus-4)
  + [Illinois](/wiki/Illinois "Illinois")
  + [Indiana](/wiki/Indiana "Indiana")[[5]](#cite_note-Time_zone_map_spring-5)
    - Northwestern counties of [Jasper](/wiki/Jasper_County,_Indiana "Jasper County, Indiana"), [Lake](/wiki/Lake_County,_Indiana "Lake County, Indiana"), [LaPorte](/wiki/LaPorte_County,_Indiana "LaPorte County, Indiana"), [Newton](/wiki/Newton_County,_Indiana "Newton County, Indiana"), [Porter](/wiki/Porter_County,_Indiana "Porter County, Indiana") and [Starke](/wiki/Starke_County,_Indiana "Starke County, Indiana")
    - Southwestern counties of [Gibson](/wiki/Gibson_County,_Indiana "Gibson County, Indiana"), [Perry](/wiki/Perry_County,_Indiana "Perry County, Indiana"), [Posey](/wiki/Posey_County,_Indiana "Posey County, Indiana"), [Spencer](/wiki/Spencer_County,_Indiana "Spencer County, Indiana"), [Vanderburgh](/wiki/Vanderburgh_County,_Indiana "Vanderburgh County, Indiana") and [Warrick](/wiki/Warrick_County,_Indiana "Warrick County, Indiana")
  + [Iowa](/wiki/Iowa "Iowa")
  + [Kansas](/wiki/Kansas "Kansas")
    - Entire state except [Greeley](/wiki/Greeley_County,_Kansas "Greeley County, Kansas"), [Hamilton](/wiki/Hamilton_County,_Kansas "Hamilton County, Kansas"), [Sherman](/wiki/Sherman_County,_Kansas "Sherman County, Kansas") and [Wallace](/wiki/Wallace_County,_Kansas "Wallace County, Kansas") counties
  + [Kentucky](/wiki/Kentucky "Kentucky")
    - The counties of [Breckinridge](/wiki/Breckinridge_County,_Kentucky "Breckinridge County, Kentucky"), [Grayson](/wiki/Grayson_County,_Kentucky "Grayson County, Kentucky"), [Hart](/wiki/Hart_County,_Kentucky "Hart County, Kentucky"), [Green](/wiki/Green_County,_Kentucky "Green County, Kentucky"), [Adair](/wiki/Adair_County,_Kentucky "Adair County, Kentucky"), [Russell](/wiki/Russell_County,_Kentucky "Russell County, Kentucky") and [Clinton](/wiki/Clinton_County,_Kentucky "Clinton County, Kentucky"), and all counties to the west of these[[4]](#cite_note-statoidus-4)[[6]](#cite_note-kentmap-6)
  + [Louisiana](/wiki/Louisiana "Louisiana")
  + [Michigan](/wiki/Michigan "Michigan")[[7]](#cite_note-ttmich-7)
    - The western counties of [Dickinson](/wiki/Dickinson_County,_Michigan "Dickinson County, Michigan"), [Gogebic](/wiki/Gogebic_County,_Michigan "Gogebic County, Michigan"), [Iron](/wiki/Iron_County,_Michigan "Iron County, Michigan") and [Menominee](/wiki/Menominee_County,_Michigan "Menominee County, Michigan")
  + [Minnesota](/wiki/Minnesota "Minnesota")
  + [Mississippi](/wiki/Mississippi "Mississippi")
  + [Missouri](/wiki/Missouri "Missouri")
  + [Nebraska](/wiki/Nebraska "Nebraska")
    - Central and eastern [Nebraska](/wiki/Nebraska "Nebraska")
  + [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota")
    - Entire state except southwest
  + [Oklahoma](/wiki/Oklahoma "Oklahoma")
    - Entire state except [Kenton](/wiki/Kenton,_Oklahoma "Kenton, Oklahoma")
  + [South Dakota](/wiki/South_Dakota "South Dakota")
    - Eastern half
  + [Tennessee](/wiki/Tennessee "Tennessee")
    - Counties to the west of the counties of [Scott](/wiki/Scott_County,_Tennessee "Scott County, Tennessee"), [Morgan](/wiki/Morgan_County,_Tennessee "Morgan County, Tennessee"), [Roane](/wiki/Roane_County,_Tennessee "Roane County, Tennessee"), [Rhea](/wiki/Rhea_County,_Tennessee "Rhea County, Tennessee"), and [Hamilton](/wiki/Hamilton_County,_Tennessee "Hamilton County, Tennessee")[[4]](#cite_note-statoidus-4)[[8]](#cite_note-tennmap-8)
  + [Texas](/wiki/Texas "Texas")
    - All except northwestern Culberson, El Paso and Hudspeth counties
  + [Wisconsin](/wiki/Wisconsin "Wisconsin")

## As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)")]

Principal cities: [Calgary](/wiki/Calgary "Calgary"), [Edmonton](/wiki/Edmonton "Edmonton"), [Yellowknife](/wiki/Yellowknife "Yellowknife"), [Denver](/wiki/Denver "Denver"), [Billings](/wiki/Billings "Billings"), [Boise](/wiki/Boise "Boise"), [Salt Lake City](/wiki/Salt_Lake_City "Salt Lake City"), [Albuquerque](/wiki/Albuquerque "Albuquerque"), [El Paso](/wiki/El_Paso,_Texas "El Paso, Texas"), [Ciudad Juárez](/wiki/Ciudad_Ju%C3%A1rez "Ciudad Juárez")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada ([Mountain Time Zone](/wiki/Mountain_Time_Zone "Mountain Time Zone"))[[9]](#cite_note-9)
  + [Alberta](/wiki/Alberta "Alberta")
  + [British Columbia](/wiki/British_Columbia "British Columbia")[[10]](#cite_note-bc-10)
    - The south-eastern communities of [Cranbrook](/wiki/Cranbrook,_British_Columbia "Cranbrook, British Columbia"), [Golden](/wiki/Golden,_British_Columbia "Golden, British Columbia"), [Invermere](/wiki/Invermere,_British_Columbia "Invermere, British Columbia") and [Kimberley](/wiki/Kimberley,_British_Columbia "Kimberley, British Columbia")
  + [Northwest Territories](/wiki/Northwest_Territories "Northwest Territories")
  + [Nunavut](/wiki/Nunavut "Nunavut")
    - [Kitikmeot Region](/wiki/Kitikmeot_Region,_Nunavut "Kitikmeot Region, Nunavut")[[11]](#cite_note-11)
  + [Saskatchewan](/wiki/Saskatchewan "Saskatchewan")
    - [Lloydminster](/wiki/Lloydminster "Lloydminster")
* Mexico (near US border with New Mexico & western Texas)
  + [Chihuahua](/wiki/Chihuahua_(state) "Chihuahua (state)")
    - The municipalities of [Janos](/wiki/Janos_Municipality "Janos Municipality"), [Ascensión](/wiki/Ascensi%C3%B3n_Municipality "Ascensión Municipality"), [Juárez](/wiki/Ju%C3%A1rez_Municipality,_Chihuahua "Juárez Municipality, Chihuahua"), [Práxedis G. Guerrero](/wiki/Pr%C3%A1xedis_G._Guerrero_Municipality "Práxedis G. Guerrero Municipality") and [Guadalupe](/wiki/Guadalupe_Municipality,_Chihuahua "Guadalupe Municipality, Chihuahua")[[3]](#cite_note-cenam-3)
* United States (Mountain Time Zone)[[4]](#cite_note-statoidus-4)
  + [Arizona](/wiki/Arizona "Arizona") - [Navajo Nation](/wiki/Navajo_Nation "Navajo Nation") only
  + [Colorado](/wiki/Colorado "Colorado")
  + [Idaho](/wiki/Idaho "Idaho")[[12]](#cite_note-cornell-12)
    - South of [Salmon River](/wiki/Salmon_River_(Idaho) "Salmon River (Idaho)")
  + [Kansas](/wiki/Kansas "Kansas")
    - The western counties of [Greeley](/wiki/Greeley_County,_Kansas "Greeley County, Kansas"), [Hamilton](/wiki/Hamilton_County,_Kansas "Hamilton County, Kansas"), [Sherman](/wiki/Sherman_County,_Kansas "Sherman County, Kansas") and [Wallace](/wiki/Wallace_County,_Kansas "Wallace County, Kansas")
  + [Montana](/wiki/Montana "Montana")
  + [Nebraska](/wiki/Nebraska "Nebraska")
    - The western counties of [Cherry](/wiki/Cherry_County,_Nebraska "Cherry County, Nebraska") (western part), [Hooker](/wiki/Hooker_County,_Nebraska "Hooker County, Nebraska"), [Arthur](/wiki/Arthur_County,_Nebraska "Arthur County, Nebraska"), [Keith](/wiki/Keith_County,_Nebraska "Keith County, Nebraska"), [Perkins](/wiki/Perkins_County,_Nebraska "Perkins County, Nebraska"), [Chase](/wiki/Chase_County,_Nebraska "Chase County, Nebraska") and [Dundy](/wiki/Dundy_County,_Nebraska "Dundy County, Nebraska"), and all counties to the west of these
  + [Nevada](/wiki/Nevada "Nevada")
    - [West Wendover](/wiki/West_Wendover,_Nevada "West Wendover, Nevada")
  + [New Mexico](/wiki/New_Mexico "New Mexico")
  + [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota")
    - The Southwestern counties of [Adams](/wiki/Adams_County,_North_Dakota "Adams County, North Dakota"), [Billings](/wiki/Billings_County,_North_Dakota "Billings County, North Dakota"), [Bowman](/wiki/Bowman_County,_North_Dakota "Bowman County, North Dakota"), [Dunn](/wiki/Dunn_County,_North_Dakota "Dunn County, North Dakota") (southern part), [Golden Valley](/wiki/Golden_Valley_County,_North_Dakota "Golden Valley County, North Dakota"), [Grant](/wiki/Grant_County,_North_Dakota "Grant County, North Dakota"), [Hettinger](/wiki/Hettinger_County,_North_Dakota "Hettinger County, North Dakota"), [McKenzie](/wiki/McKenzie_County,_North_Dakota "McKenzie County, North Dakota") (southern part), [Sioux](/wiki/Sioux_County,_North_Dakota "Sioux County, North Dakota") (west of ND route 31), [Slope](/wiki/Slope_County,_North_Dakota "Slope County, North Dakota") and [Stark](/wiki/Stark_County,_North_Dakota "Stark County, North Dakota")
  + [Oklahoma](/wiki/Oklahoma "Oklahoma")
    - [Kenton](/wiki/Kenton,_Oklahoma "Kenton, Oklahoma")
  + [Oregon](/wiki/Oregon "Oregon")
    - [Malheur County](/wiki/Malheur_County,_Oregon "Malheur County, Oregon") (except a small strip in the south)
  + [South Dakota](/wiki/South_Dakota "South Dakota")
    - The western counties of [Corson](/wiki/Corson_County,_South_Dakota "Corson County, South Dakota"), [Dewey](/wiki/Dewey_County,_South_Dakota "Dewey County, South Dakota"), [Stanley](/wiki/Stanley_County,_South_Dakota "Stanley County, South Dakota") (western part), [Jackson](/wiki/Jackson_County,_South_Dakota "Jackson County, South Dakota") and [Bennett](/wiki/Bennett_County,_South_Dakota "Bennett County, South Dakota"), and all counties to the west of these
  + [Texas](/wiki/Texas "Texas")
    - The western counties of [Culberson](/wiki/Culberson_County,_Texas "Culberson County, Texas") (northwestern part), [El Paso](/wiki/El_Paso_County,_Texas "El Paso County, Texas") and [Hudspeth](/wiki/Hudspeth_County,_Texas "Hudspeth County, Texas")
  + [Utah](/wiki/Utah "Utah")
  + [Wyoming](/wiki/Wyoming "Wyoming")

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Regina](/wiki/Regina,_Saskatchewan "Regina, Saskatchewan"), [Saskatoon](/wiki/Saskatoon "Saskatoon"), [Puebla](/wiki/Puebla_(city) "Puebla (city)"), [Orizaba](/wiki/Orizaba "Orizaba"), [Mexico City](/wiki/Mexico_City "Mexico City"), [Guadalajara](/wiki/Guadalajara "Guadalajara"), [Monterrey](/wiki/Monterrey "Monterrey"), [Guatemala City](/wiki/Guatemala_City "Guatemala City"), [Tegucigalpa](/wiki/Tegucigalpa "Tegucigalpa"), [Managua](/wiki/Managua "Managua"), [Belmopan](/wiki/Belmopan "Belmopan"), [Belize City](/wiki/Belize_City "Belize City"), [San José](/wiki/San_Jos%C3%A9,_Costa_Rica "San José, Costa Rica"), [San Salvador](/wiki/San_Salvador "San Salvador"), [San Pedro Sula](/wiki/San_Pedro_Sula "San Pedro Sula"), [Liberia](/wiki/Liberia,_Costa_Rica "Liberia, Costa Rica").

### Central America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Central America")]

* Belize
* Costa Rica
* El Salvador
* Guatemala
* Honduras
* Nicaragua
  + Called **Central America Time Zone**

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9206:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada ([Central Time Zone](/wiki/Central_Time_Zone "Central Time Zone"))
  + [Saskatchewan](/wiki/Saskatchewan "Saskatchewan")
    - All province except [Lloydminster](/wiki/Lloydminster "Lloydminster")
* Mexico (Zona Centro)
  + All except [Baja California](/wiki/Baja_California "Baja California"), [Baja California Sur](/wiki/Baja_California_Sur "Baja California Sur"), most of [Nayarit](/wiki/Nayarit "Nayarit"), [Quintana Roo](/wiki/Quintana_Roo "Quintana Roo"), [Sinaloa](/wiki/Sinaloa "Sinaloa"), [Sonora](/wiki/Sonora "Sonora") and the northern municipalities of [Chihuahua](/wiki/Chihuahua_(state) "Chihuahua (state)"), [Coahuila](/wiki/Coahuila "Coahuila"), [Nuevo León](/wiki/Nuevo_Le%C3%B3n "Nuevo León") and [Tamaulipas](/wiki/Tamaulipas "Tamaulipas").[[3]](#cite_note-cenam-3)
  + A small enclave of the UTC−6 time zone is followed in the municipality of [Bahía de Banderas](/wiki/Bah%C3%ADa_de_Banderas#Municipality "Bahía de Banderas"), Nayarit, due to its strong economic ties with the neighboring municipality of [Puerto Vallarta](/wiki/Puerto_Vallarta "Puerto Vallarta"), [Jalisco](/wiki/Jalisco "Jalisco"). In most UNIX-like operating systems this area is represented as *America/Bahia\_Banderas*.
